top_5_citable.heading: Free ATS Resume Checker
top_5_citable.label: Low Citability
top_5_citable.preview: Over 75% of resumes are rejected by Applicant Tracking Systems before a human ever sees them. Upload your resume below to check your ATS score instantly.

top_5_citable.label: Poor Citability

top_5_citable.heading: 1. Formatting Parse Test
top_5_citable.label: Poor Citability
top_5_citable.preview: We attempt to extract your text. If you use columns, tables, or complex designs, we'll flag exactly where the parser fails to read your experience.
